# PALO Framework - Distributable Package

## Istruzioni

Questa e una versione standalone del sito PALO Framework.

### Come usare

1. Estrai il file ZIP in una cartella qualsiasi.
2. Apri `index.html` con il browser.
3. Naviga tra le pagine cliccando sui link.

### Requisiti

- Connessione Internet per CDN esterne come Tailwind CSS, Font Awesome e Google Fonts.
- Browser moderno: Chrome, Firefox, Safari o Edge.

### Contenuto principale

| File | Descrizione |
| --- | --- |
| `index.html` | Homepage PALO Framework con changelog aggiornato |
| `PALO_FRIA.html` | Fundamental Rights Impact Assessment |
| `PALO_ModelCanvasAI.html` | AI Model Canvas Tool |
| `PALO_RiskTiering.html` | EU AI Act Risk Tiering Calculator |
| `PALO_KPIGenerator.html` | KPI Generator Tool |
| `PALO_ComparisonTool.html` | Framework Comparison Tool |
| `PALO_HumanAgencyRiskMap.html` | Human Agency Risk Map |
| `PALO_HumanAgencyRiskMap_IT.html` | Human Agency Risk Map in italiano |
| `PALO_TechTrends2026.html` | 2026 Tech Trends Observatory |
| `PALO_AuditBench.html` | AuditBench Explorer |
| `PALO_PoisoningStudy.html` | The Poisoning Boomerang |
| `PALO_VibeCoding.html` | AI-assisted software development governance |
| `PALO_AgenticGovernance.html` | PALO-AM Agentic Governance Modality |
| `PALO_CompanionApp.html` | Mobile companion app page |
| `PALO_Community.html` | Community and Advisory Board |
| `accessibility.html` | Accessibility Statement |
| `privacy-policy.html` | Privacy Policy |
| `security-policy.html` | Security Policy |
| `feed.xml` | RSS Feed |
| `assets/` | Logo and static assets |
| `agentic/` | PALO-AM page styles |
| `vibe-coding/` | AI Dev Governance page styles |
| `poisoning-study/` | Poisoning Study styles and scripts |
